arts.ttl: Hugo Ekitike hits out after turning down Newcastle United transfer
arts.sum: Although Ekitike admitted he would have been'stupid' if he had not learned from training alongside some of the best players in the world at PSG, the 22-year-old did not progress like he had hoped. Hugo Ekitike has claimed PSG did not help him to 'do better' after the Frenchman turned down a move to Newcastle United to join the Parisian giants.

arts.ttl: How to watch West Ham vs Newcastle: TV channel and live stream for Premier League today
arts.sum: Hammers will feel confident about beating Toon Army again

arts.ttl: Newcastle United transfer state of play as priority clear and £20m deal getting closer
arts.sum: Lloyd Kelly departed the club in January on an initial loan deal but Italian side Juventus have an obligation to buy the former Bournemouth star for £20m come the summer. Newcastle's backline options currently look thin on the ground but even if Howe had all assets available to him there is still a nagging feeling that a new arrival is needed in that particular position.

arts.ttl: Ex-Newcastle United striker Aleksandar Mitrovic rushed to hospital after 'stress-related heart issue'
arts.sum: It comes less than two days after their 2-0 win over Al Feiha with Mitrovic on target in his first game back from a hamstring injury. The 30-year-old continued his form in the Middle East after establishing himself as a key player for Fulham following a frustrating period at St James' Park - where he scored 17 goals in 72 outings.

arts.sum: Juventus suffered a humiliating defeat in Turin against Atalanta, seeing their fans leave the stadium...

arts.ttl: “Everyone aligns” | Kudus gives praise to Potter
arts.sum: Mohammed Kudus is the latest player to praise the impact of Graham Potter at West Ham. The Ghana international has acknowledged it hasn’t been the best of the seasons for the club and on a personal level, however he admits that things are turning as we look to end the season well. “We’re going in... The post “Everyone aligns” | Kudus gives praise to Potter appeared first on The West Ham Way.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak one goal away from Newcastle record Alan Shearer never managed
arts.sum: West Ham will decide a lot for Wembley _ if Martin Dubravka starts in goal as a reward for his loyalty, if Kieran Trippier gets an unexpected starting place, if Tino Livramento is the accepted left-back replacement, if Harvey Barnes is to at last step out of the shadows and prove himself to be a £37m buy or if Joe Willock is to be catapulted back into the public consciousness. Now we go again attempting to wipe out the memory of a similar SJP setback at the feet of West Ham before travelling back to the capital for the Carabao Cup final.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United will love 'unreal' transfer target's reaction to Harry Kane
arts.sum: Newcastle are expected to renew their interest in Trafford in the summer, which won't come as a surprise to Lescott, who was struck by the goalkeeper's ability to 'turn it on'. Joleon Lescott has admitted that he is'surprised' James Trafford is still at Burnley because the Newcastle United target is 'unreal'.
